headline: Citizens Expands Community Impact Across Rhode Island As Part of Broader Commitment to Local Communities
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., May 27, 2026--Citizens today announced a series of community investments that reinforce its long-standing commitment to Rhode Island, spanning financial education, workforce development, small business growth, and housing stability.

headline: Centri secures $20m credit facility to support growth plans
summary: The funding will be used to support acquisitions and recruitment throughout the firm.
